Best AI Productivity Tools (2026)

AI-powered note-taking, meeting summaries, and workspace organization tools.

Gemini by Google

Google's AI assistant, deeply integrated with Search, Gmail, Docs, and Android.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)

Notion AI by Notion Labs

AI features built directly into the Notion workspace for notes, docs, and databases.

💲 Paid only — Add-on from $8-10/user/mo on top of a Notion plan

Otter.ai by Otter.ai

AI meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available (limited minutes/month); paid plans from $8.33/mo

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
